shellCommands.command: /bin/bash -lc "sed -n '1,240p' .agents/skills/mempal-memory/SKILL.md && printf '\\n--- files ---\\n' && rg --files src/components/Tooltip src/test | head -80"

/bin/bash -lc "mempal search \"react-tooltip openOnClick delegated document click stopPropagation event capture\" --json --top-k 5
printf '\\n--- delegation ---\\n'
sed -n '1,260p' src/components/Tooltip/event-delegation.ts
printf '\\n--- events ---\\n'
sed -n '1,320p' src/components/Tooltip/use-tooltip-events.tsx
printf '\\n--- status ---\\n'
git status --short"

/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '260,620p' src/components/Tooltip/use-tooltip-events.tsx
printf '\\n--- relevant tests ---\\n'
rg -n \"openOnClick|stopPropagation|stopProp|click\" src/test/tooltip-interaction-behavior.spec.js src/test/tooltip-interactions.spec.js | head -120
printf '\\n--- package scripts ---\\n'
node -e \"const p=require('./package.json'); console.log(p.scripts)\""

/bin/bash -lc 'git diff --check && git diff -- src/components/Tooltip/event-delegation.ts
git status --short
mkdir -p "$HOME/.mempal-notes"
cat > "$HOME/.mempal-notes/delegated-click-stop-propagation.md" <<'"'EOF'
# Capture delegated interaction events

Document-level delegated handlers in the bubbling phase cannot observe an anchor event after the anchor calls "'`stopPropagation()`. Registering the shared delegation listener in the capture phase, and using the same capture setting for removal and reset, preserves delegated behavior while allowing propagation-stopping anchors to be handled.
EOF
mempal ingest "$HOME/.mempal-notes" --wing memory-evals'

errors: `--dangerously-bypass-hook-trust` is enabled. Enabled hooks may run without review for this invocation.
